title: TOFU fingerprint display in popup
description: After key exchange completes, compute SHA-256 fingerprint of daemon's X25519 public key (first 16 hex chars). Display in popup as 'Daemon Fingerprint: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX' for manual verification. Daemon exposes GET /api/cowork/fingerprint so Dave can cross-check.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension computes SHA-256 of daemon's raw X25519 public key after key exchange
First 16 hex characters displayed in popup as fingerprint (grouped in 4s: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX)
Fingerprint only shown when session is encrypted
GET /api/cowork/fingerprint returns current session's daemon public key fingerprint
Fingerprint matches between extension popup and daemon API endpoint
